step_rationale: Classical-complement-pathway serine protease; decreased in incident AMI; complement regulation.
mechanism: C1RL initiates classical-complement cascade, and its decreased level may reflect complement consumption during acute MI.

references.title: A Mass Spectrometry-Based Proteome Study of Twin Pairs Discordant for Incident Acute Myocardial Infarction within Three Years after Blood Sampling Suggests Novel Biomarkers.
